summary: Fixed bug in Notification.tsx identified by frontend-review-agent (handoff 022). Replaced fragile startsWith-based error detection with robust includes('error') check. Added 8 unit tests in Notification.test.tsx covering T-FE-PERS-001-04 and T-FE-SHARE-001-03. PR #37 opened on branch bugfix/36-notification-error-detection and is ready for review.

artifacts.name: Notification.tsx (fixed)
artifacts.description: Fixed isError condition: replaced fragile startsWith logic with robust includes('error') check

artifacts.name: Notification.test.tsx
artifacts.description: 8 unit tests covering all error/success message variants and accessibility attributes

artifacts.name: PR #37
artifacts.description: [area:frontend] Fix error notification detection in Notification.tsx (#36)

artifacts.name: Issue #36
artifacts.description: Bug report: Notification.tsx error detection uses startsWith instead of includes

recommended_actions: Verify Notification.tsx now uses includes('error') instead of startsWith
Verify Notification.test.tsx covers 'Error: Storage limit exceeded.' case (T-FE-PERS-001-04)
Check accessibility: role=status and aria-live=polite still present
